use_cases: Displaying a rotating sequence of images with text overlays for hero sections
Creating an immersive gallery experience for photography or artwork portfolios
Building a product showcase carousel for e-commerce landing pages
Implementing a brand story presentation for marketing campaigns
Adding visual storytelling to agency or creative portfolio websites
ai_summary: A minimalist image slideshow component that cycles through background images with overlaid text. Features left/right navigation buttons and a slide counter. The component uses a simple state-based approach to toggle active slides, making it lightweight and performant for showcasing visual content in hero sections or gallery displays.
